test.testName: PREGNANCY GROWTH SCAN WITH BPP DOPPLER ULTRASOUND SCAN

basic_info.name: PREGNANCY GROWTH SCAN WITH BPP DOPPLER ULTRASOUND SCAN

faqs.question: Is the scan safe for my baby?
faqs.answer: Yes, ultrasound and Doppler have excellent safety records.

faqs.question: How long does the entire process take?
Can I eat before the scan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a light snack is encouraged to stimulate fetal activity.

faqs.question: Will I get the results immediately?
faqs.answer: Yes, the provisional report is handed over on the same visit.

faqs.question: Do I need a full bladder?
faqs.answer: Not usually required in the third trimester.

faqs.question: How often should this scan be repeated?
faqs.answer: Your doctor will advise; typically every 2–4 weeks if high-risk.

seo.title: Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan at Cadabams
seo.description: Learn why Cadabams Diagnostics recommends the Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan for safe, accurate third-trimester monitoring. Book today.

test.markdown:
## Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan Overview

### What this combined scan measures
- Accurate fetal weight and growth trajectory
- Real-time fetal movements, breathing, muscle tone, and heart-rate patterns
- Blood-flow velocity in the umbilical and middle cerebral arteries
### How it differs from routine growth scans
Routine growth ultrasounds look mainly at size. The \*\*Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan\*\* adds functional checks—oxygen delivery and fetal behaviour—so subtle problems are caught earlier.
### Why Cadabams Diagnostics recommends it
Our radiologists use high-resolution probes and AI-assisted reporting, ensuring measurements are precise to the millimetre and Doppler indices are benchmarked against international curves.
## What is Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan?
### Definition of Growth Scan
A systematic ultrasound that measures head circumference (HC), abdominal circumference (AC), femur length (FL), and estimated fetal weight.
### Role of BPP (Biophysical Profile)
A 30-minute observation scoring five parameters—breathing, movement, tone, amniotic fluid, and heart-rate reactivity—each rated 0 or 2 for a maximum of 10.
### Purpose of Doppler Ultrasound
Colour and pulsed-wave Doppler map blood flow in the umbilical artery, middle cerebral artery, and ductus venosus, flagging resistance changes that signal placental insufficiency.
### Integration in one session
Cadabams completes all three components in a single 30–45 minute appointment, sparing you multiple visits.
## Types of Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan
| Type | What’s Included | When Used |
|---|---|---|
| Growth-only scan | Biometry & amniotic fluid | Low-risk routine check |
| BPP-focused scan | Biophysical profile only | Decreased movements |
| Doppler velocimetry | Umbilical & cerebral artery flow | Suspected IUGR |
| Combined comprehensive scan | All of the above | High-risk or overdue pregnancies |

## When and Who Needs to Take a Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan?

- \*\*Ideal gestational age\*\*: 28–40 weeks
- \*\*High-risk pregnancy indicators\*\*: hypertension, diabetes, previous IUGR
- \*\*Maternal conditions prompting the scan\*\*: sudden swelling, decreased fetal kicks
- \*\*Doctor’s referral scenarios\*\*: overdue pregnancy (>40 weeks) or abnormal prior scan

## Risks & Limitations of the Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan

- \*\*Ultrasound safety profile\*\*: No radiation; decades of data show no harm at diagnostic intensity.
- \*\*Possible false positives/negatives\*\*: BPP can miss acute hypoxia if the baby is sleeping; repeat scans may be advised.
- \*\*Limitations in detecting chromosomal issues\*\*: Structural survey is done earlier; this scan focuses on growth and function.

## List of Parameters Considered During the Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan

- \*\*Fetal biometry\*\*: BPD, HC, AC, FL
- \*\*Amniotic fluid index (AFI)\*\*
- \*\*Placental grading & position\*\*
- \*\*Umbilical artery Doppler indices\*\*: PI, RI, S/D ratio
- \*\*Middle cerebral artery Doppler\*\* (when indicated)
- \*\*BPP parameters\*\*: breathing, movement, tone, AFI, heart-rate reactivity

## Reasons for Taking a Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan

- Suspected intrauterine growth restriction (IUGR)
- Monitoring gestational diabetes or hypertension
- Decreased fetal movements
- Overdue pregnancy evaluation

## Benefits of Taking the Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan

- \*\*Early detection of fetal compromise\*\* before distress becomes critical
- \*\*Guiding delivery timing\*\*—vaginal birth vs early induction
- \*\*Reduced maternal anxiety\*\* with clear, numerical data
- \*\*Non-invasive and quick\*\*—no needles, no fasting

## Illnesses Diagnosed with Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan

- Intrauterine growth restriction (IUGR)
- Placental insufficiency
- Oligohydramnios / polyhydramnios
- Abnormal umbilical cord blood flow

## Preparing for Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan

- Eat a light meal 30 minutes prior to encourage fetal activity
- Bring prior scan reports for comparison
- Wear loose two-piece clothing for easy abdomen access
## Pre-requisites Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan
- Valid doctor’s prescription
- Confirmed gestational age (LMP or early scan)
- Fasting \*\*not\*\* required
## Best Time to Take the Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan
- \*\*28–32 weeks\*\*: baseline growth & Doppler
- \*\*34–37 weeks\*\*: repeat in high-risk cases
- \*\*>37 weeks\*\*: pre-delivery check
## Eligibility
- All pregnant women ≥28 weeks
- Especially high-risk mothers
- Singleton or twin pregnancies
## Procedure for Taking a Pregnancy Growth Scan with BPP Doppler Ultrasound Scan
1. \*\*Check-in & consent\*\* at Cadabams Diagnostics
2. \*\*Transabdominal ultrasound examination\*\* (~30 minutes)
3. \*\*Real-time observation\*\* of BPP parameters
4. \*\*Doppler waveform capture\*\* for blood-flow analysis
5. \*\*Reporting within 30 minutes\*\* with printed and digital copies
## Caution Before Taking the Test
- Inform sonographer of latex allergy
- Mention any bleeding or pain
- Limit caffeine intake to avoid excess fetal activity that can skew BPP scoring
